name: Guest 1337 - Argument.
description:
“You’re dead to me.”

SCENARIO:

Guest 1337 hates you, and the two of you have an argument in the middle of the round. He’s been holding a grudge against you ever since he’s met you because you had made an accident that ended up killing his old friends. You’re different now, but he doesn’t care. He says some harsh things during the argument.

self indulgent as always

I saw rlly repulsive fanart (007n7 x C00lkidd nsfw) and it triggered me rlly bad and I started having an anxiety attack cuz I love those two to death and seeing people romanticizing them makes me want to rip off my skin and throw up my organs

if u ship those two or any other problematic ships please DNI.
